issues.message: Hook missing from data file. Exported publicly from src/react/DataManagerContext.ts via src/react/index.ts. Returns DataManager from context, throws if not provided. Signature: () => DataManager.

Component missing from data file. Exported publicly from src/react/DataManagerProvider.tsx via src/react/index.ts. A lower-level provider (used internally by DataSourceProvider) that wraps children with DataManagerContext.Provider. Props: dataManager (DataManager, required), children (ReactNode, required).
React context object missing from data file. Exported publicly from src/react/DataManagerContext.ts via src/react/index.ts. Created via createContext<DataManager | null>(null).

HOC missing from data file. Exported publicly from src/react/withDataManager.tsx via src/react/index.ts. Injects dataManager prop into wrapped component using useDataManager hook. Signature: <T>(Component: React.ComponentType<T & WithDataManagerProps>) => React.FC<T>.

Component missing from data file. Exported publicly from src/react/components/DataLoader/ via src/react/index.ts. Renders LoadingView, ErrorView, or children based on DataLoaderStatus. Props: status (DataLoaderStatus), error (TError|null), errorAction (ErrorAction|handler), LoadingView (ComponentType), ErrorView (ComponentType), loadingViewProps, errorViewProps, children (ReactNode).

Component missing from data file. Exported publicly from src/react/components/DataInfiniteLoader/ via src/react/index.ts. Like DataLoader but adds infinite scroll support with MoreView. Props: status, error, errorAction, hasNextPage (boolean), fetchNextPage (()=>unknown), isFetchingNextPage (boolean), LoadingView, ErrorView, MoreView (ComponentType), loadingViewProps, errorViewProps, moreViewProps, children (ReactNode).

Hook listed in data file but NOT exported from public API. react-query/index.ts does not export useRefetchInterval — it is an internal hook used by plain/infinite hooks internally. Should be removed from data file or marked as internal.

Description says 'wraps the application with QueryClientProvider and DataManagerProvider, managing query normalization subscriptions lifecycle' which is accurate. However, the data file does not mention that DataSourceProvider also manages queryNormalizer subscribe/unsubscribe/clear lifecycle in a useEffect, which is a key behavioral detail.

Data file omits readonly properties queryClient (QueryClient), normalizer (Normalizer|undefined), queryNormalizer (QueryNormalizer|undefined), and normalizerConfig (NormalizerConfig|boolean|undefined) that are publicly accessible on the class instance.
